upcomingMilestones.title: GPT-4o introduced
upcomingMilestones.summary: GPT-4o fused text, image and audio into a single flagship model and reset the baseline for mainstream multimodal products.

upcomingMilestones.title: GPT-3 launched via the OpenAI API
upcomingMilestones.summary: GPT-3 opened the first large commercial wave of general-purpose LLM product building.

upcomingMilestones.title: Attention Is All You Need released
upcomingMilestones.summary: The Transformer paper established the architecture that now underpins the modern LLM era.

upcomingMilestones.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet launched
upcomingMilestones.summary: Claude 3.5 Sonnet quickly became one of the strongest coding and writing models in the market.

upcomingMilestones.title: Claude 2 launched
upcomingMilestones.summary: Claude 2 made Anthropic’s assistant more broadly available and pushed the long-context commercial race forward.

upcomingMilestones.title: Llama 2 released
upcomingMilestones.summary: Llama 2 became the most important open-weight launch of 2023 and broadened serious industry use of open models.

upcomingMilestones.title: Stable Diffusion public release
upcomingMilestones.summary: Stable Diffusion accelerated open image-generation adoption and made consumer AI image creation a mainstream topic.

upcomingMilestones.title: OpenAI o1-preview launched
upcomingMilestones.summary: OpenAI’s o1-preview pushed reasoning-first models into the mainstream product conversation.

latestLaunches.title: Grok 3 announced
latestLaunches.summary: Grok 3 marked xAI’s move into the reasoning-agent frontier with a much stronger model family.

latestLaunches.title: DeepSeek-R1 released
latestLaunches.summary: DeepSeek-R1 pushed low-cost reasoning into the mainstream model conversation and accelerated global interest in Chinese frontier labs.

latestLaunches.title: DeepSeek-V3 released
latestLaunches.summary: DeepSeek-V3 turned the lab into a serious global open-model competitor late in 2024.

latestLaunches.title: OpenAI o1-preview launched
latestLaunches.summary: OpenAI’s o1-preview pushed reasoning-first models into the mainstream product conversation.

latestLaunches.title: GPT-4o introduced
latestLaunches.summary: GPT-4o fused text, image and audio into a single flagship model and reset the baseline for mainstream multimodal products.

latestLaunches.title: Llama 3 released

labMilestones.title: xAI founded
labMilestones.summary: xAI launched in 2023 and quickly became the lab behind the Grok model line.

sources.label: xAI
sources.notes: Company page points to July 2023 as the company starting point.

canonicalSource.label: xAI
canonicalSource.notes: Company page points to July 2023 as the company starting point.

labMilestones.title: Moonshot AI founded
labMilestones.summary: Moonshot AI joined the post-ChatGPT Chinese lab wave and later built the Kimi family.

trackingDate.note: Secondary reporting consistently points to March 2023, but the exact public founding day remains unclear.

sources.label: Aurora Mobile investor relations
sources.notes: Partnership release describing Moonshot AI as founded in March 2023.

canonicalSource.label: Aurora Mobile investor relations
canonicalSource.notes: Partnership release describing Moonshot AI as founded in March 2023.

labMilestones.title: DeepSeek founded
labMilestones.summary: DeepSeek emerged in 2023 and later broke into the global frontier conversation with low-cost reasoning models.

trackingDate.note: Secondary reporting points to spring 2023; keep public precision at year until an official filing or company page confirms more.

sources.notes: Useful secondary reference citing the early 2023 High-Flyer launch of DeepSeek.

labMilestones.summary: Mistral AI launched in 2023 and quickly became Europe’s most prominent open-weight AI lab.

canonicalSource.notes: Official company launch article; exact company founding day not explicitly stated.

labMilestones.title: MiniMax founded
labMilestones.summary: MiniMax was founded in early 2022 and became part of the new wave of Chinese multimodal model companies.

trackingDate.note: Official MiniMax material says founded in early 2022 but does not confirm a day or month.

labMilestones.title: Anthropic founded
labMilestones.summary: Anthropic emerged as a safety-focused frontier lab and became the second major commercial model family of the ChatGPT era.

sources.label: Anthropic
sources.notes: Official April 2022 post confirms Anthropic was founded at the beginning of 2021, but does not provide an exact day.

canonicalSource.label: Anthropic
canonicalSource.notes: Official April 2022 post confirms Anthropic was founded at the beginning of 2021, but does not provide an exact day.

labMilestones.title: Cohere founded
labMilestones.summary: Cohere launched with an enterprise-first strategy and became a durable commercial model provider.

labMilestones.title: Zhipu AI founded
labMilestones.summary: Zhipu AI became one of the most visible Chinese frontier-model companies through the GLM line.

labMilestones.title: OpenAI founded
labMilestones.summary: OpenAI launched as a non-profit AI research company and later became a central lab in the ChatGPT era.

labMilestones.title: DeepMind founded
labMilestones.summary: DeepMind was founded in London and became one of the defining labs of the frontier-model era.

sources.notes: Official lab history source confirming 2010 founding year.

canonicalSource.notes: Official lab history source confirming 2010 founding year.

historicalHighlights.title: Grok announced
historicalHighlights.summary: xAI introduced Grok and established its real-time, X-connected assistant product line.

historicalHighlights.title: Google DeepMind formed
historicalHighlights.summary: Google merged DeepMind and Google Brain into one lab, concentrating one of the largest frontier AI teams under a single brand.

historicalHighlights.title: Claude introduced
historicalHighlights.summary: Anthropic introduced Claude and started the commercial expansion of the Claude family.

historicalHighlights.title: ChatGPT launched
historicalHighlights.summary: ChatGPT turned language models into a mass-market product and reset the pace of AI product adoption.

historicalHighlights.title: AlphaFold breakthrough at CASP14
historicalHighlights.summary: AlphaFold’s CASP14 performance reshaped expectations for AI-assisted protein structure prediction.

historicalHighlights.title: GPT-2 announced
historicalHighlights.summary: GPT-2 pushed text generation quality forward and sparked the first big public debate over staged release in frontier models.

historicalHighlights.title: Attention Is All You Need released
historicalHighlights.summary: The Transformer paper established the architecture that now underpins the modern LLM era.

historicalHighlights.title: AlphaGo beats Lee Sedol
historicalHighlights.summary: DeepMind’s AlphaGo beat Lee Sedol in Seoul and turned modern AI progress into a mainstream global story.

historicalHighlights.title: AlexNet wins ILSVRC 2012
historicalHighlights.summary: AlexNet made deep learning impossible to ignore by winning the 2012 ImageNet competition with a dramatic error-rate jump.

trackingMilestones.summary: Moonshot AI joined the post-ChatGPT Chinese lab wave and later built the Kimi family.
